fields.title: Adapt Ralph pi boundary and runtime wiring
fields.description: Shrink src/ralph/index.ts into a thin pi adapter that registers commands/tools/events, translates callback inputs into Effect programs, and keeps session actions command-owned through a per-call adapter service.
fields.design: Introduce a RalphCommandContext-style adapter layer for command-only session actions such as newSession and switchSession. Update initRalph and app.ts so runtime-owned Ralph services are provided once at the app edge and handlers invoke them via injected runEffect helpers.
